programme.title: Jamie's Italian Christmas
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver travels to the stunning Aosta Valley in northern Italy to share some top-notch festive recipes that put an Italian twist on all our yuletide celebrations.

programme.title: Jamie's Best Ever Christmas
programme.desc: Christmas Day - Jamie sets you up for a stress-free Christmas Day, with everything from turkey to mulled wine.

programme.title: Jamie's Best Ever Christmas
programme.desc: Festive Food - Jamie focuses on delicious festive food options like jerk ham and clementine jelly.

programme.title: Mega Transports
programme.desc: Meyer Werft in Germany is one of the biggest shipbuilders in the world. But it's problem is as big as the ships it builds: the coast and sea are 50 kilometres away.

programme.title: Mega Transports
programme.desc: A giant of the skies - the Antonov AN-124-100M-150. Worldwide the biggest production cargo aircraft of all time. No aircraft can transport more goods than the Russian giant.

programme.title: Wild Christmas
programme.desc: Donkeys, reindeer, robins: Christmas tradition, symbolism and history are full of characters from the natural world.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: The islands of the Bahamas are ringed with lush coral, underground cave systems, and plunging barrier reefs. Beyond the white sands and turquoise water, marine life abounds: agile reef sharks, large whitetip sharks, manatees, sea turtles, and wild dolphins.

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: Though Africa's three big cats—the lion, leopard, and cheetah—live side by side, each has evolved a specialized set of hunting strategies that keep them from colliding. Take an in-depth look at the lives and stories of these iconic apex predators.

programme.title: Katherine Jenkins: Christmas Spectacular
programme.desc: Classical music superstar Katherine Jenkins OBE presents a magical and unique Christmas musical from the iconic Royal Albert Hall, bringing joy and festive celebrations to audiences around the world this holiday season.

programme.title: The Nine Lives Of Christmas
programme.desc: A fireman afraid of commitment and an aspiring veterinarian waiting for true love are drawn together by their cats, and an unexpected romance blossoms.

programme.title: The Truth About Christmas,
programme.desc: After she tells a Christmas lie, a woman is cursed to only tell the truth when she spends the holidays with her boyfriend's family.

programme.title: Royal Runaways
programme.desc: A prince doesn't want to become King after his father dies, so he hides at a winery as a handyman to follow his own path.

programme.title: A Holiday Wish Come True
programme.desc: Two sisters' only wish is to spend the holidays as a family, forcing their divorced parents to work out their issues and find love again.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour: What Really Happened
programme.desc: A woman (Anne Francis) stands trial for her husband's murder, and the family maid (Ruth Roman) holds the key to the truth.

programme.title: Portrait Artist of the Year: Mary Berry

programme.title: Kate Bush, the Timeless Genius
programme.desc: Kate Bush broke new ground in pop music with her poetic and radical otherness. Looking back at her career, giving a voice not only to the musician herself, but also to all those she continues to inspire today.

programme.title: Battle Of The Irish Dancers: Game On
programme.desc: Game on: Dancers and their teachers, we shine a light on this amazing art form, which requires the strength, endurance and agility of an Olympian. (3 of 3)

programme.title: The Great Gatsby
programme.desc: A wealthy 1920s bootlegger devotes his life to improving his social status and renewing a love affair with a now-married woman.

programme.title: Artist of the Year
programme.desc: It's the final and the three remaining artists capture the landscape of Winkworth Arboretum in Surrey, before one is crowned Landscape Artist of the Year 2017.

programme.title: Artist of the Year
programme.desc: Following the winner of Landscape Artist of the Year 2017 to Jamaica, where they will paint the breathtaking view from Noel Coward's home, Firefly.

programme.title: Artist of the Year

programme.title: Artist of the Year

programme.title: Artist of the Year

programme.title: Artist of the Year
programme.desc: Joan Bakewell and Frank Skinner welcome a new group of artists to Knaresborough, where they are challenged to paint the striking views of the historic viaduct.

programme.title: Artist of the Year
programme.desc: The competition heads to Paddy's Hole, South Gare, where Frank Skinner and Joan Bakewell invite a new group of artists to capture the striking harbour scene.

programme.desc: From the appendix to the zygomatic bone, Conan's your personal anatomy assistant.

programme.desc: Conan and his guests open up to reveal their inner selves.

programme.title: Conan O'Brien
programme.desc: Conan satirically salutes TV's soon-to-be-forgotten season of try-outs, when the networks threw all against the wall in search of what sticks.

programme.title: Dr. Aditi Nerurkar
programme.desc: Dr. Aditi Nerurkar is a doctor and global public health expert who specialises in stress, resilience and burnout. She discusses everything from the need to create digital boundaries, to why multitasking is a myth.

programme.title: Bryan Johnson
programme.desc: Bryan Johnson is an entrepreneur and anti-aging pioneer who uses an algorithmic and automotive approach to optimal health and ageing. He goes in-depth about his life and why he thinks ageing isn't inevitable.

programme.title: Thierry Henry
programme.desc: Thierry Henry is known as one of the best strikers and Premier League players of all time. The former footballer turned coach opens up about expectations, mental struggles post-retirement and how he overcame them.

programme.title: Lucy Hale
programme.desc: Lucy Hale, the actress best known for her role in ‘Pretty Little Liars', opens up about her rocky road to fame. She talks about sacrificing some of the most precious years of her life, and her inner journey.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Jessica Alba Applies Lip Gloss While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Jessica Alba is an actress whose career checks every box, from big budget blockbusters to TV cult classics.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Post Malone Has His Brain Hacked By Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Post Malone is back! Watch as two brothers in spice reunite over a brand-new hot sauce lineup and discuss everything from ghosts to "Magic the Gathering" to the state of the music industry.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Kristen Bell Ponders Morality While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Kristen Bell has a career in TV and film that includes everything from box office smashes to cult classics.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Tom Arnold Melts Down While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Comedian Tom Arnold has been through it all: a public divorce from Roseanne Barr, a harrowing season of "I'm a Celebrity...Get Me Out of Here!" and all the slings and arrows of Hollywood life. Will "Hot Ones" be his most daunting foe yet?

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Ken Jeong Performs a Physical While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The multitalented actor and former physician Ken Jeong faces off against the wings of death. Jeong dispels common medical myths, discusses encounters with NBA legends like Shaq and Kevin Durant and even gives Sean a free check-up.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Maisie Williams Shivers Uncontrollably While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Winterfell legend Maisie Williams battles the (vegan) wings of death and discusses everything from appearing on Binging with Babish to "Game of Thrones" myths and that time Drake shouted her out at the Billboard Music Awards.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Lil Yachty Has His First Experience With Spicy Wings
programme.desc: After a life completely devoid of spice, rapper Lil Yachty dives into the hot sauce deep end, trading in his usual meal of pepperoni pizza for ten scorching hot chicken tenders.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Alexa Chung Fears for Her Life While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Alexa Chung takes on the wings of death and explains how she got banned from red carpet hosting duties.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Gordon Ramsay Savagely Critiques Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Despite his misgivings about the culinary quality of the wings of death, Gordon throws himself into the challenge. He discusses his chef influences, explains how to make the perfect scrambled eggs and tries to find an antidote to spicy food.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Adam Carolla Rants Like a Pro While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Ace Man looks back on his storied career and battles his way through the wings of death. Along the way, the rant king gets going on everything from Kanye West to iced tea to the brilliance of crows.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Josh Brolin Licks the Palate of Absurdity While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Academy Award-nominated actor Josh Brolin takes on the wings of death and discusses working with the Coen Brothers, growing up on punk rock and his favorite TV shows of all time.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Von Miller Geeks Out Over Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Leading up to Super Bowl LII, Denver Broncos linebacker Von Miller tests himself against the wings of death.

programme.title: Children Ruin Everything
programme.desc: Feeling like parenthood has eroded her friendships, Astrid (Meaghan Rath) jumps at a playdate, and James (Aaron Abrams) attempts to keep his own commitments while holding things down at home.

programme.title: It's A Boy Girl Thing
programme.desc: A visit to a natural history museum proves catastrophic for two rival teens when an ancient statue casts a spell that causes them to switch bodies.

programme.title: Penn and Teller Fool Us
programme.desc: Jon Armstrong with a card trick involving a mini plunger, Xavier Mortimer battling his ghostly reflection, Greg Dow (The Shocker) with his predictions, Steven Brundage doing tricks with Rubik's Cubes, and finally Penn & Teller do a trick involving an audience member's cellphone.

programme.title: Penn and Teller Fool Us
programme.desc: Leone Etienne and Romy Low (AKA: Leon & Romy) with a card trick, Mike Hammer with an inflated prediction trick, Shin Lim doing various card tricks to instrumental music, Peter Boie and his spirited trick, and Teller does tricks with a ball and string.

programme.title: The I.T. Crowd
programme.desc: Jen's flirtation with a company security guard gets a little out of hand.

programme.title: The I.T. Crowd
programme.desc: When Roy gets stuck beneath an employee's desk, it's up to Moss to extricate his mate.

programme.title: Wild Oats
programme.desc: After the death of her husband, Eva, a retired school teacher, accidentally receives an insurance of USD 50,00,000. She and her friend Maddie decide to enjoy life with the acquired money.

programme.title: Pierre Novellie: Why Can't I Just Enjoy Things?
programme.desc: Pierre Novellie looks into why he can't just enjoy things. He isn't a curmudgeon, exactly, it's just most things feel about 6 out of 10 – and he doesn't see eye-to-eye with anyone else on what makes a 0/10 or a 10/10.

programme.title: Rich Girl Wants Friends Boyfriend
programme.desc: Spoiled Gina schemes to win back her ex, Chase, by faking a relationship with sweet Pete. Her manipulative plan backfires spectacularly, exposing her true colors and leading to public humiliation, leaving her to ponder her shallow ways.

programme.title: Dating 100 Millionaires For True Love
programme.desc: To secure a vast inheritance, Victoria agrees to date 100 millionaires in a month. She falls for Henry, her hardworking waiter, realizing genuine connection trumps wealth. Their love defies her mother's materialistic demands, leading them to pursue their dreams together.

programme.title: Girl Dumps Billionaire For Card Declining
programme.desc: Spoiled Wes, heir to a media empire, is forced to pretend he's a new father to secure a promotion. He hires struggling actress Phoebe to play his baby's mom, leading to hilarious mishaps and unexpected self-discovery.

programme.title: Guys Breakup Wasn't The End
programme.desc: An influencer, Dina, makes a bet she can get a guy to dump her for a video. Unbeknownst to her, the guy, Aaron, has a bet he can make her fall for him to win money. As they try to manipulate each other, they fall in love. They reveal their painful pasts and realize their feelings are genuine.

programme.title: Girlfriend Forgets Everything Every Morning
programme.desc: Lexi has daily amnesia, waking with no memory of the previous day. Her boyfriend, Cooper, and best friend, Ari, help her cope, but secrets from her past—and a shocking betrayal—unravel as Lexi slowly regains her memory.

programme.title: Rich Girl Goes Undercover As Normal Girl
programme.desc: A pampered princess, arranged to marry a superficial prince, seeks freedom in America. There, she falls for a humble, kind boy and learns to stand up for herself, ultimately breaking free from tradition and finding true love.

programme.title: Boyfriend Picks Girlfriends Clothes Out Everyday
programme.desc: Jay's strict cultural values clash with his girlfriend Gemma's dreams of a cheerleading scholarship, leading to a breakup. Witnessing his sister's secret passion for cheer, Jay realizes his controlling ways and embraces a more understanding path, hoping to reconcile with Gemma.

programme.title: Influencer Gets Canceled
programme.desc: Driven by fame and wealth, an influencer's ego spirals, leading to self-sabotage, public backlash, and financial ruin. Stripped of her former life, she finds humility working in a convenience store.

programme.title: Rich Bride Kicks Out Poor Bridesmaid
programme.desc: Mindy, a bridezilla, pushes away her lifelong best friend Yazmin, who can't afford the extravagant wedding demands. When disaster strikes on the wedding day, Yazmin steps in to save it, reminding Mindy that true friendship matters more than lavish displays.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Chris Fuller, a former British Army Bomb Disposal Officer, who now does humanitarian work in the Middle East, talks to us about defusing bombs in the centre of London, and the difference between working in the UK and abroad.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this week's episode of Minutes With, we sat down with American veteran Chris VanSant as he takes us through his remarkable career in the Delta Force. Chris reveals the rigorous selection process required to join the elite force and takes us inside combat situations, explaining the complex operations that led to the capture of Saddam Hussein and the 'deck of cards' during the invasion of Iraq. Chris explains how death, loss and guilt caught up with him after years of service, leading to a moment that changed his life forever and set him on a new path.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Ben Francis was a delivery driver for Pizza Hut when he started Gymshark. Gymshark is now worth over £1billion. This is how he went from making the product in his family home, to running a sportswear business empire.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Roshaante Andersen was was born with a vagina and internal testicles. He did not find out he was intersex until he was 11 years old. In this interview he takes us through growing up as intersex, and why he chose to live as a man.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we sit down with Youssof Altoukhi, who became a crypto millionaire before he turned 18. He tells us about his trading strategy, how much he has lost in one trade and what his plans are for the future.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Chris Hemsworth and Anya Taylor-Joy settle the biggest debates on the web, weighing up whether the Australian accent is the sexiest and if they could land a plane in an emergency before enjoying a hilarious debate about time travel.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest stars Chris Wood and Morgan Gibbs-White debate some of the biggest football debates. The striker and the midfielder discuss scoring a worldie long-range striker or a tap-in? And who would make the best manager?

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Man City fan Lawrence 'Buvey' Bury tells Man United fan Adam McKola why he thinks Pep Guardiola is a better manager than Sir Alex Ferguson was. The rivals debate the arguments between the two clubs ahead of the 2023 Manchester derby FA Cup Final.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: In this episode of LADbible's Agree to Disagree, F1 movie stars Brad Pitt and Damson Idris go head-to-head over some of the internet's biggest debates… and things get surprisingly heated on the topic of 90s vs modern fashion and even hot dogs!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Anya Taylor-Joy and Alexander Skarsgård choose between UK and Swedish vegan snacks in this entertaining episode of Snack Wars! They compare Greggs sausage rolls to Swedish meatballs and fruit gums to a Swedish snack called Djungelvrål. Zac Efron and Ryan Kiera Armstrong compare UK and USA snacks! Zac has a hilarious reaction to Toxic Waste, Ryan tries her first-ever Twinkie, and they both can't get enough of British snacks!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Comedians James Acaster and Ed Gamble, the hosts of the brilliant Off Menu podcast, enjoy a battle of Posh vs Normal food, and take a real trip down memory lane with some iconic British snacks. The results are hilarious! Florence Pugh compares American and British snacks and explains why she loves Branston Pickle so much, gets nostalgic drinking Ribena, and has a great time playing the BeanBoozled Jelly Belly game and eating some disgusting flavours!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Two four-year-old children, Cooper and Millie, take part in Snack Wars: Kids, as the pair of youngsters taste some foods they've never tried before! The little ones tackle olives from Italy, mochi from Japan and Takis from Mexico. Six-year-old twins, Naushi and Neave, try some brand-new snacks from around the world in this fun episode of Snack Wars: Kids! From freaking out over Twiglets, to getting terrified of guacamole, this is an episode of you don't want to miss.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest stars Anthony Elanga, Ola Aina and Callum Hudson-Odoi play Snack Wars! The Nigeria, Sweden and England internationals compared and rated food from the UK and the rest of the world, including treats from Taiwan and China.

programme.title: Namaste England
programme.desc: Param is besotted with Jasmeet when he watches her dance during a Dussehra celebration. An ambitious Jasmeet wishes to be a jewellery designer, but her father and brother discourage her. They even agree to wed her off to Param, who doesn't want her to work after marriage. Once they get married, Jasmeet tries to coax Param to get UK citizenship even if it means resorting to illegal means. But Param is a man of principles and rejects her ideas. Unknown to him, Jasmeet comes up with a risky plan to fulfill her ambitions.

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: Simmba
programme.desc: Sangram Bhalerao aka Simmba is an unabashedly corrupt policeman who does not hesitate to make the local ganglord Durva his brother from another mother to ensure a regular inflow of bribes. Meanwhile, Simmba falls in love with Shagun, who runs a catering service next to Miramar Police Station in Goa, where he is stationed. He even finds a sister in a 19-year-old medical student, Aakruti, who teaches orphans in her free time. Soon, Aakruti stumbles upon a drug smuggling ring run by Durva's brothers and is brutally raped and killed. This twist in the tale transforms Simmba and forces him to choose the righteous path.

True to his principles, Pan-ho urges his son to turn himself in?but when he discovers that the victim is none other than the second son of Kim Kang-heon, the powerful chairman of Woowon Group, he makes a fateful decision: to cover up his son's crime.

programme.title: Stork Army: Women Fighting for the Hargila
programme.desc: In South East Asia the Greater Adjutant Stork, known locally as the Hargila, is a sight to behold. But this towering bird has seen its numbers dwindling rapidly to the point of endangerment. One woman has made it her mission to save this species from extinction. Purnima Devi Burman decided she had to take matters into her own hands, with no support from the government or financial resources, she raised a team of female environmental warriors to join her fight to save the Hargilas. She christened them ‘The Hargila Army' - and this is their story.

programme.title: The Pull of the Wild
programme.desc: Since the dawn of time, snakes have fostered our fascination, playing a significant role in our most ancient stories. Follow environmental photojournalist Aaron Gekoski as he investigates our relationship with one of the planet's most popular exotic pets: ball pythons. Traversing four continents, he witnesses sacred rituals, visits voodoo markets and joins expeditions into remote West Africa to discover how ball pythons make their way into the homes of pet owners, worldwide.

programme.title: Nuts about Squirrels
programme.desc: Squirrels have conquered tundra, deserts, forests and more, developing ingenious life skills along the way, from stashing nuts to fighting snakes.

programme.title: World's Rarest
programme.desc: The world is facing an urgent biodiversity crisis. Untold numbers of animals are at risk of being lost forever, with many species racing towards extinction. In this show, we try to highlight some of these incredible creatures, from the plucky pangolins to the critically endangered rhinoceroses, who live in constant fear of the poacher's bullet. Films provide a record of Earth's wonderful wildlife, but this is hopefully not an archive of what's lost, but evidence of what we should be preserving.

programme.title: Pythons and the Exotic Pet Trade
programme.desc: For those of us that long to escape the rat race the pull of the wild can be strong. Whether we're risking our lives with extreme sports, following our animal passions or just taking a walk on the wild side, the natural world calls to us. What's more, the power of nature tests our limits, opens our eyes and heals our hearts in equal measure. So why try to resist such a beautiful, exciting and enlightening siren song? Perhaps there's nothing better for us humans than to follow the pull of the wild.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: The endless plains of East Africa is a paradise for lions. The most social of all cats, lions form prides that are unlike any other animals. Together, they'll hunt, raise their young and defend their territory. With such a close family and plentiful home, the pride welcomes new babies every year. But new children introduces new dangers. The cubs will have to trust their instincts, their mother and the power of the pride if they are to make it to adulthood and take their place on the African plains.

programme.title: Stork Army: Women Fighting for the Hargila
programme.desc: In South East Asia the Greater Adjutant Stork, known locally as the Hargila, is a sight to behold. But this towering bird has seen its numbers dwindling rapidly to the point of endangerment. One woman has made it her mission to save this species from extinction. Purnima Devi Burman decided she had to take matters into her own hands, with no support from the government or financial resources, she raised a team of female environmental warriors to join her fight to save the Hargilas. She christened them ‘The Hargila Army' - and this is their story.

programme.title: The Pull of the Wild
programme.desc: Since the dawn of time, snakes have fostered our fascination, playing a significant role in our most ancient stories. Follow environmental photojournalist Aaron Gekoski as he investigates our relationship with one of the planet's most popular exotic pets: ball pythons. Traversing four continents, he witnesses sacred rituals, visits voodoo markets and joins expeditions into remote West Africa to discover how ball pythons make their way into the homes of pet owners, worldwide.

programme.title: Wilderness in Europe: The Bohemian Forest
programme.desc: Pavel Hubeny, whose life would be unthinkable without the forest, is the head of the Šumava National Park. He is committed to ensuring that a primeval forest can grow for future generations, in which man does not interfere. This vision of a primeval forest is also shared by the forester Claus Bässler, who wants to counteract the extinction of species by having trees felled to create artificial deadwood and thus a new habitat for rare beetles and fungi. On the Vltava River lies the small town of Krumlov, the "Pearl of the Bohemian Forest" with its Baroque theater and fully preserved stage technology from the 17th century. Here the director Zuzana Vrbová enchants people from all over the world with her productions. Apart from agriculture, it was mainly the abundance of forests that ensured the livelihood of the inhabitants of the Bohemian Forest - including that of the carpenter Philipp von Manz, who processed local wood for his customers all over Germany. Veterinarian Judith Gollner, who grew up in the Austrian part of the Bohemian Forest, lived in Vienna for a long time and made a conscious decision to return. She likes the people and is proud of "her farmers' wives" who share her love of the Bohemian Forest.

programme.title: Wild Bavaria
programme.desc: The moon disappears behind the horizon and the stage is set for a new day in the Alps of Berchtesgaden.

programme.title: Wild Bavaria
programme.desc: Mighty and mysterious, King Watzmann sits above Germany's only alpine national park.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The first episode of this two-part nature documentary presents the natural beauty of the shifting sand dunes of the Curonian Spit, the romantic beaches of the Latvian Baltic Sea and the island worlds of Estonia. Time and again, this deserted and almost untouched nature fascinates. In the winter, ringed seals give birth to their young on the pack ice. In the spring, Konik wild horse stallions fight fierce battles amongst themselves, while colourful European rollers fly through the dune forests. Lynxes wander through the coastal forests and in the orchid meadows turncoats and hoopoes find more than enough food. On the islands around Saaremaa in Estonia, grey seals hunt for fish. They share the archipelago with Europe's largest tern, the Caspian tern.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The wide, often untouched wilderness of the Baltic hinterland is home to many animals. More than 35 brown bears live in the primeval forests of Alutaguse. In the spring, the Soomaa National Park transforms into a huge lake. Europe's widest waterfall is located in Latvia. In the beginning of May, vimba bream follow the course of the River Venta. The hardly 5-centimetre-long fish have to overcome a 4-metre-long rock barrier in order to reach their spawning grounds.

programme.title: The Moor
programme.desc: Moors and peatlands are oases in the cultivated landscape of Central Europe.

programme.title: Bosnia Herzegovina
programme.desc: Wild and unknown lies the still undiscovered natural paradise of Bosnia and Herzegovina in the heart of Europe. Rough mountains, dense forests and wild waterfalls characterize the picture of the untouched landscapes. Lynx, wolves and bears roam mountains and valleys. One of the last primeval forests in Europe is a retreat for many endangered animal species. Bosnia and Herzegovina is actually an undiscovered natural paradise in the middle of Europe.

Another delicacy is rice cakes with sausages skewered together and glazed with spicy sauce.

programme.title: 1DAY 1KOREA
programme.desc: Gukbap is one of the delicacies in Busan made of pork bone broth and pork slices served with rice. The origin of this delicious and hearty treat dates back to the Korean War when refugees made a broth out of pork bones which were more readily available than ox bones.

programme.title: 1DAY 1KOREA
programme.desc: Tofu is an affordable source of protein and a versatile ingredient in Korean cuisine. Dubu gangjeong is pan-fried crunchy tofu tossed in sweet and sour sauce. Even kids who don't like eating tofu will enjoy this healthy and savory dish.

programme.title: 1DAY 1KOREA
programme.desc: Highway rest stops in Korea are a great place to enjoy local delicacies. An example would be kkomak bibimbap in Boseong which is a bowl of rice topped with chubby cockles and assorted vegetables and served with spicy sauce. Other popular foods found at rest stops include hot bar, a fish cake bar made from white fish fillet, squid and vegetables.

programme.title: 1DAY 1KOREA
programme.desc: Spring is in the air with trees and flowers bursting into life. What better season to have a picnic with your family and friends? We have prepared some quick and easy recipes featuring seasonal ingredients that you can try at your next picnic, including rice balls, bacon-wrapped rice cake, fresh fruits and strawberry juice.

programme.title: 1DAY 1KOREA
programme.desc: Chef Ryan shares with us how to make danhobakjuk, a sweet pumpkin porridge. Boiled sweet pumpkin is simmered with glutinous rice flour and garnished with chewy little rice cake balls and a few pumpkin seeds. As the temperature drops, there's nothing like this comforting dish to warm you up. With its rich flavors, danhobakjuk truly captures the taste of autumn.

programme.title: 1DAY 1KOREA
programme.desc: Bomdong, or spring cabbage, signals the arrival of spring. Rich in vitamin c, these greens are sweet and savory. When added to the doenjang soybean paste soup, bomdong leaves help remove sodium in the paste, while giving a refreshing kick. Try these recipes to liven up your spring table!

programme.title: 1DAY 1KOREA
programme.desc: Fish cake and noodles simmered in a savory broth is a popular and filling food at rest stops. After indulging in the hearty soup, try roasted butter potatoes with a crispy outside and a tender inside.

programme.title: Walk of Art
programme.desc: We explore how art has influenced the cultural landscape of Qatar and how it can be an immersive experience for those who visit, live and work there. We meet designers and artists who reflect the country's layers of creativity, cultural diversity and modern identity. They guide us through Doha's open-air gallery, taking us to the public artwork that inspires them the most and represents a milestone in Qatar's artistic evolution. From Doha Mountains and Cesar's Pouce to remembering Qatar's pearl diving heritage and the first artistic landmark - the Museum of Islamic Art.

programme.title: Inside Africa
programme.desc: As part of Inside Africa's 25th anniversary, we have a sit-down between two of the continent's most celebrated voices: Angelique Kidjo and Lupita Nyong'o. The setting is The Met's newly reimagined Arts of Africa gallery, a powerful space in which to reflect on African creativity, identity, and legacy. Five-time Grammy award winning Kidjo and Oscar-winning actor Nyong'o reflect on their careers and the rise and influence of African culture across the world.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Krzysztof Radzikowski, the leader in the league will fight hard to keep Dainis Zageris off from the title and to gather another 25 ranking points in this next stage in Latvia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The competition sees a close battle with a new world record in overhead dumbbell and close finishes throughout the day. This stage is in Croatia, in a city over 1700 years old, steeped in Roman tradition and history, the athletes arrive for the truck pull after a picturesque boat ride on the Adriatic Sea.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are now half way through the SCL 2015 and getting closer to the grand world finals in Turkey. The eighth stage is in Poland, the home country of the current leader Krzysztof Radzikowski.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this stage we go into the mountains of Austria to find out through six grueling events who is the strongest in the land of Alps. Martin Wildauer, current World Champion 2014 and Austrian local is competing alongside Zageris, Radzikowski, Belsak and many others.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The 10th stage of this year's competition in Strongman Champions League is held in the Romanian city of Sibiu where the 12 strongmen continue to compete for the title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The 11th stage is the SCL Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. In this championship, each competitor must lift three different weights overhead. Zydrunas Savickas is the current world record holder in the Log Lift.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This next episode of the Strongman Champions League is hosted in Lithuania and sees us getting one step closer to the final.

programme.title: NCT DREAM The 5th Album 'Go Back To The Future' Playlist
programme.desc: 6. 'Bout You 9. Beautiful Sailing1. BTTF 4. DREAM TEAM 5. Interlude : Back to Our Paradise 2. CHILLER 7. That Summer 「Go Back To The Future」 reflects on the fact that every step of their journey so far has been without regret, while also reaffirming their identity as “the brightest NCT DREAM” across the past, the present, and the “absolute now.” Fully embracing this moment, the seven members move forward with confidence toward another peak and the next chapter of their story. 3. I LIKE IT 8. Miss Me [Track List] NCT DREAM once again proves their brightest moment with their 5th full-length album, 「Go Back To The Future」. This album tells the story of the curious and quirky NCT DREAM embarking on a time-travel journey to find their most radiant selves, capturing various events and emotions they experience while traveling through the past, present, and future in nine tracks.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' Trailer
programme.desc: In the latter part of the video, the title track “FOCUS” audio and part of the choreography are revealed, raising anticipation for the new release.Hearts2Hearts' first mini album FOCUS features a total of six tracks, including the title track “FOCUS,” the single “STYLE,” and the pre-release song “Pretty Please,” showcasing a diverse musical palette. The album trailer captures the members' bold and free-spirited sides as they play around and dance together in a quiet space.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' MV
programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts' first mini album title track “FOCUS” is a house genre-based song that features a vintage piano riff and an addictive melody, showcasing the group's cool and chic vocal charm. Set against a school backdrop, the music video delicately captures the complex emotions between the members. Its lyrics sensually express the feeling of being completely focused on someone, offering a fresh glimpse into Hearts2Hearts' unique appeal. Choreographed by Jo Na-In, the performance delivers a sleek and sophisticated atmosphere.

programme.title: NCT DREAM : They Were Here To Beat It Up Trailer
programme.desc: The trailer “They Were Here To Beat It Up” wittily portrays NCT DREAM breaking through their limits and opening a new chapter of their own stage with surreal visuals and storytelling, powerfully setting the tone for the beginning of the new album.Centering on the theme of “the speed of time,” the album delivers a bold message that the members — who have been running toward their dreams since childhood — continue to grow, while confidently moving forward at their own pace and in their own way. NCT DREAM's 6th mini album “Beat It Up” consists of six tracks, including the title track of the same name, “Beat It Up.”

programme.title: NCT DREAM 'Beat It Up' MV
programme.desc: The title track “Beat It Up” hits hard with bold kicks, heavy bass, and a vibe that's all about breaking limits with confidence. The music video amps it up even more with a boxer concept, powerful moves, snappy cuts, and punch-heavy choreography that fires off the song's energy.NCT DREAM's sixth mini album “Beat It Up” takes on the theme of 'the speed of time', sending a message that they're moving forward in their own pace and style.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' Trailer
programme.desc: Focusing on the unseen side of RIIZE's growth journey, the single features a total of three tracks, including the title track “Fame.” It expresses the members' moments of anxiety, emptiness, and the intense emotions that arise amid their struggles, all captured through RIIZE's unique genre of “emotional pop.”RIIZE's new single “Fame” is set to be released.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.”

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: When L.J.'s rose-tinted sunglasses turn out to be Shard-tinted, our heroine is her own problem. The effect makes her so Pollyanna, she can see no evil!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: Ban Tang isn't a ghost town, people are INVISIBLE. Black Tiger steals a crystal ball with an invisibility Shard in it to become the world's greatest thief.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: Xin Qi needs a vessel like a genie needs a lamp. Tonight's strength-giving lunar event should help. When the Crimson Lord learns Jade 7 survived as electricity, he vows to "pull the plug" on her.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The Crimson Lord completes his Armor. The timing couldn't be worse for L.J. to learn she wasn't destined to be Jade!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: While life at Ban Tang is back to normal, the Beasticons are trying to convince Lan Jun to hang up the Jade Armor and retire the Bracelet.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: When the Crimson Lord - now green and zen - embarks on an Apology Tour all over Ban Tang, Lan Jun sees red.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: Lan Jun sends Kai a cute "Wish You Were Here" postcard from Ban Tang: she's missed him since he was shipped off to boarding school!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: There's no rest for Lan Jun when an eerie fog hits Ban Tang and a strange dark figure is seen wandering the city, and even getting their hands on a Shard!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The Ye School of Kung Fu joins Boba Bistro to hold a cross-promotional event to attract new students! Sign up for a trial Kung Fu class, get a free order of Gram's famous Longevity Noodles!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: At the Boba Bistro, a Dark Shard in a box of tissues suddenly makes everyone over the top melodramatic like a bad soap opera... It's tough luck, especially for Lan Jun who's mortifyingly affected.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: Every year the school Science Fair is VP Lane's favourite annual class event where students flex their inventiveness - Lan Jun hopes to shine in this scientific challenge!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: Alisha is horrified when her beloved Boba Bistro is turned into a cat café! She's terribly allergic, it's a real cat-astrophe!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: Following the shocking revelation of the new Dark Shards' origin, Jade decides to become a "traditional" Jade: no more improv, she'll play by the rules of the previous Jades!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: Animal-loving Theo has made a new friend: a terrifying stray dog he's named Mr. Woof! When the surly dog is lost, Theo calls Lan Jun and Alisha for help.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: A new Crimson Beasticon arrives in Ban Tang: Pixiu -the Winged Lion. Stuck in the form of a bronze statue, he's about to be auctioned at the Museum during a special event to which Kai invites Lan Jun.

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: The Might And The Magic
programme.desc: Aaron races across the kingdom to gather the NEXO-Knights as Jestro and his Destructive Monsters attack the King's Castle. The Knights must get back to the capitol in time, or Jestro will rule the kingdom! Jestro, while still attacking the King's Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he's found (and has been saving.) It's the powerful “Book of Revenge!” Now, combining the powers of Revenge and Destruction, Jestro and his monsters will get their vengeance on King Halbert and the Kingdom of Knighton. Jestro and his monsters lay siege…will they destroy the castle?! Meanwhile, Aaron races across the Kingdom gathering the NEXO-Knights one at a time. As each Knight rejoins the group, they become a more and more powerful team. They even get Robin to join them as the Black Knight in his repaired power suit. Our Knights arrive, finally regrouped, fight off Jestro, save the castle and the King. It's a glorious victory! The King is so pleased after seeing how the brave NEXO-Knights saved his kingdom, he allows Macy to join them as an official NEXO-Knight.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Peak Performance
programme.desc: The search for the Sandman leads Mateo and the others to the tallest mountain in the Dream World, but Lunia's hourglass puts a target on their backs.

programme.title: The Anomaly
programme.desc: A surprise visit from the Chief Inspector of the Night Bureau forces Mateo to hide Z-Blob, who goes on an adventure in the heart of Brooklyn.

programme.title: The Digiverse And Beyond, The Elemental Masters
programme.desc: Tackling a puzzle about technology in Ninjago. A riddle requires the Ninja to consider the powers and history of the Elemental Masters.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Getting Out the Vote
programme.desc: It's Stephanie vs. Tanya for Heartlake High Class President. But when Tanya resorts to dirty tricks, Stephanie decides to give her a taste of her own medicine. Elect Tanya as Heartlake High Class President?! "NOOOOOOOO!!!!" Not if Friends Stephanie, Emma, Olivia, Mia and Andrea can help it. The Friends are there to help their pal Matthew defeat Tanya -- even when Emma gets carried off by "Vote For Matthew" balloons! But Tanya figures since "Daddy" is now the Mayor of Heartlake City, she doesn't have to play by the rules. When she sneakily sabotages Matthew's campaign, it's time for a determined Stephanie to take his place as candidate. With the help of her friends, Stephanie is set on running a clean campaign -- that is, until Tanya resorts to more dirty tricks, and Stephanie decides to give Tanya a taste of her own medicine.

programme.title: Getting Tthe Message
programme.desc: As the Friends enjoy Heartlake Amusement Park, Emma types a text to Mia, but sends it to Matthew by mistake a text that could be mega-embarrassing for Emma! As her BFF's, the Friends race to find Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they must brave space rides, dunking booths and worse: the boys locker room! What's more frightening than a roller coaster? More phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, BFF's, the Friends must scramble to retrieve Matthew's twisted than a funhouse mirror? A text gone wrong! The text that accidentally sounds like a pledge of Emma's frantic race against time when Emma discovers that her Friends' fun day at Heartlake Amusement Park turns into a undying love for Matthew! Mega-embarrassing! As Emma's they need to brave space rides, dunking booths, an angry brute and worse - the boys locker room!innocent text to Mia was sent to Matthew by mistake -- a

programme.title: The Grateful Dud
programme.desc: At the Country Club where she teaches horseback riding after school, Mia's heroic rescue of a puppy and horse earns the overwhelming gratitude of their owner, a teen bulldozer named Fiona. But when Fiona's pushy, over-the-top appreciation makes Mia's life a living nightmare, the Friends must Ride To The Rescue! At the Country Club where she teaches horseback riding after school, Mia's heroic rescue of a puppy and horse earns the overwhelming gratitude of their owner, a brassy teen bulldozer named Fiona. Although Fiona means well, her pushy, over-the-top appreciation soon makes Mia's life a living nightmare: embarrassing Mia at school, scaring away her boyfriend, and causing major havoc at the Country Club. The Friends must find a way for Mia to escape Fiona's nonstop gratitude and foil Tanya's sneaky schemes to get Mia kicked out of the club. And when a crisis erupts at the club's Fall Ball and Horse Show, all the Friends have to do some fancy riding to help their BFF save the day.

programme.title: Black Out
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd. After destroying the Power Station, the Ninja have dealt a massive blow to the Nindroids, but find getting back to the city troublesome without power. At the Junk Yard, Zane gives half of his heart to revive Pixal to help give guidance in their greater mission. Meanwhile, a mysterious cloaked Interloper steals the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord and creates a new foe for the Ninja to fight… Tech Wu. On the other side of Ninjago, Lloyd is trained by his father to harness his Golden Power to unlock an even greater potential – the power of the First Spinjtzu Master.

programme.title: The Curse Of The Golden Master
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas' search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd. The Ninja return to a powerless New Ninjago City and visit the Serpentine Tombs in effort to solve who had taken the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord – only to discover the snakes have gone straight. They learn of Serpentine Lore that a Golden Master will conquer all of Ninjago. The Nindroids attack, but with the help from Scales and his Serpentine ilk, they fight off the enemy and discover the culprit they are after is none other than Pythor! But it's too late… the Digital Overlord and his henchman have captured Lloyd in a plot to sap his Golden Power to finally become flesh.

programme.title: Enter The Digiverse
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive. Unable to save Lloyd in time, the Ninja resort to drastic measures. With the help from Borg's advanced technology, the Ninja get digitized with their Techno Blades into the Digiverse in order to battle the Digital Overlord on his own turf and erase evil for good. While the Ninja learn new capabilities and explore the fantasy of a ‘digital world', their friends must protect them from Pythor and his army in the ‘real world'. In the climatic conclusion, the Ninja ‘reboot the system' and save Sensei Wu and Lloyd, but the Digital Overlord has managed to become flesh in the nick of time, only to be in a weakened state.

programme.title: The Invitation
programme.desc: When the Ninja receive an invitation to partake in the Tournament of Elements and a clue that Zane might be alive, they accept and travel to a Lost Island owned by notorious crime lord Master Chen in order to save their friend. The loss of Zane has fractured the team of Ninja, but when a mysterious invitation to Master Chen's ‘Tournament of Elements' arrives, everything is thrown into question – Is Zane alive, and are there others out there with powers like them? Sensei Garmadon warns them not to trust Master Chen, but they go in order to find Zane and make the team whole. On route to the island, the Ninja are briefly introduced to the other unique fighters with elemental powers, and the mysterious and beautiful Skylor intrigues Kai. Kai gets into a humbling scrap with Karlof, the Master of Metal, and learns some fights must be done on your own.

programme.title: The King's Tournament
programme.desc: Rival to the King, Jorah Tightwad thinks his knights – the Tighty Knighties – are easily better than the NEXO-Knights, so he challenges King Halbert to prove who's better during the King's Birthday Tournament. It's the King's birthday! To celebrate, the Queen and Macy always throw him a great, big birthday party consisting of a feast on birthday eve and a tournament the next day. At the birthday banquet is JORAH TIGHTWAD (last seen in episode 104.) He's goading the King (and on his birthday, even) and going on and on about how his knights are better than the NEXO-Knights. The King protests, but Jorah asks “How many magical books have your knights recovered? None, zilch, zero.” But he produces the BOOK OF ENVY, which his superior knights captured from Jestro. The next day, the NEXO-Knights square off against Tightwad's four knights: JOUSTING BEEBER, BRICKNEY SPEARS, SHIA LABLADE and THE BLOK. We see that all these knights are envious of the NEXO-Knights: their weapons, their fame, their hair, etc. Macy is also disappointed to find out she CAN'T fight in the tournament – she's agreed to be in “princess mode” for her father's birthday. During the tournament, we see that Tightwad's knights are amazing in fighting contests. They all pair-off with knights who have their same weapons skills. Tightwad makes fun of the NEXO-Knights as his knights do well. Jestro and the Book of Monsters discover that Tightwad has the Book of Envy and he and his monsters attack the tournament. Then we learn that Tightwad's knights might be good tournament fighters, but they can't handle real fights and the NEXO-Knights must save them! Macy is finally able to join in the fight when she sees Magmar show up on the flank. The NEXO-Knights successfully defend the king, but Jestro gets away with the Book of Envy. Tightwad must admit his knights never won the book from Jestro he got the book when Merlok blasted books of magic across the realm. Tightwad's knights all admit that they really admire the NEXO-Knights.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Sari must defend the Autobots' base against an intrusion by the Constructicons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Decepticons kidnap Bulkhead to assist in Megatron's plan to conquer Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Alex, Rad, and Carlos find the Exodus and are adopted by three Minicons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Alexis, Rad and Carlos introduce themselves to Optimus Prime, Hot Rod and First Aid.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The kids join the Autobots on a mission to find a newly awakened Minicon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Wheeljack returns to Earth in pursuit of a new Decepticon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Airachnid and Starscream struggle for control over an Insecticon warrior.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime seems to go on a destructive rampage, while MECH unveils their ultimate plan.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Agent Fowler faces a tribunal over recent covert operations.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons enslave people through mind control.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Part The Earth is being torn apart by geological forces and natural disasters.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: On Cybertron, Spike and the small band of Autobots attempt to sabotage the Decepticons hypno-chip.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With Megatron presumed dead, Starscream makes his boldest grab for power yet.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Giant robot insects rampage through the island of Bali.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and Megatron prepare to face off in a duel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurf Who Would Be King: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - April Smurf's Day: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: Master Scruple
programme.desc: Farmer Smurf is the reluctant master of a genie named Gourdy, whose enthusiasm for service is somewhat excessive. After yet another incident due to Gourdy's overzealousness, Farmer Smurf says something he shouldn't and Gourdy disappears. And guess who finds him? Well, it's Scruple, apprentice to the evil wizard Gargamel. And who should steal Gourdy from Scruple, if not Gargamel himself?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Jungle Jitterbug: The rain forest of South America is not a place where Vanity Smurf would like to spend his life. And then he starts dancing madly when he gets jungle fever. His dance will have strange results.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hefty's Heart: Gargamel infects Hefty's heart with hate and then uses the little Smurf as a decoy for the others. Fortunately, Hefty's love overcomes his hate and he helps his little friends escape from Gargamel's clutches.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Like It Or Smurf It: The Smurfs are on a paradise Pacific Island. Well, not exactly paradise, since there is a very active volcano, on which a very active Hefty Smurf risks his life as well as Smurfette's!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Jokey's Funny Bone: Jealous of the attention Vanity Smurf receives when he breaks his toe, Jokey Smurf feigns sickness in hopes of getting recognition. Unfortunately, his ploy turns against him and instead of loving care all he receives is the proverbial pound of curse.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Lazy's Nightmare: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Romeo And Smurfette: Spring has the Smurfs all competing for Smurfette's affection and Gargamel decides to put a spell on her to help him capture the Smurfs. Papa Smurf intervenes and with the help of the foolish Azrael he foils the wizard's plans.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hefty's Rival: Oh, the sad plight of Hefty Smurf! He used to be the strongest and the best trained of all the Smurfs. But since Wild Smurf arrived in the Village, nobody pays attention to Hefty anymore. What can Papa Smurf do?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sassette's Bewitching Friendship: Smurfs try to avoid contact with humans. But this time, Sassette is happy to be friends with a little witch called Melina, whose spells often end up in disaster. And anyway, are witches really human? At any rate, wizards such as Gargamel are.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Little Big Smurf: Smurfs would make delicious meals for the evil wizard Gargamel if it weren't for two things: they're difficult to catch and they're so tiny. Now, suppose there were a formula to change these bite-size snacks into big, juicy square blue meals... Gargamel has an idea...

programme.title: Smurfiplication
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel creates a magic formula that duplicates everything it touches. And surprise! Suddenly there are six Brainy Smurf! This creates a few interesting situations in the Village... And also at Gargamel's!

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Curried Smurfs: In Ancient India, the unscrupulous fakir Gargapuri sells the Smurfs to the Rajah for his private zoo. Only Grandpa, Wild Smurf and Jokey are free, so it's up to them to sneak into the palace and rescue their friends. Along the way they free all the caged animals in the Raja's menagerie.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Astrosmurf: Dreamy's wish of becoming an Astrosmurf comes true when Papa Smurf puts him to sleep, magically transforming the landscape and the Smurfs into a space fantasy. Gargamel keeps a close watch on their antics through his crystal ball, but he too falls victim to Papa Smurf's magic and is sent into a thunderstorm.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Tis The Season To Be Smurfy: This is Wild Smurf's first Christmas, and he's impressed by the decorations in the Village of the Smurfs. But Grandpa and Sassette are going to teach him the real meaning of Christmas when they help an old couple to live the most beautiful Christmas they've ever seen...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Put Upon Puppy: Life in the Smurf Village might be more peaceful if Puppy's behavior were a little more considerate. But the little Smurf dog is digging up Smurfette's flowers, dirtying Vanity's new wallpaper or ruining Papa Smurf's experiments. Yet Puppy's going to help the Smurfs out of a trap contrived by Gargamel... Or maybe he won't be disciplined enough...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Where The Wild Smurfs Are: Where have all the squirrels gone ? Wild Smurf is a little worried. He'd be more worried still if he knew about the ugly witch Hogatha's dreadful plan for making herself some hair tonic.

programme.title: Rabbid Energy
programme.desc: Mad Rabbid and his assistant get stuck in prehistoric times when the teleporta-TV runs out of juice.

programme.title: Rabbid Hibernation and the time machine.
programme.desc: After it breaks down in the middle of the desert, Hibernation Rabbid's Machine is stolen by the rabbids.

programme.title: The Rabbids are panicking!
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, two Rabbids become convinced that their boss has turned into a balloon.

programme.title: Rabbids VS Technology.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get locked inside a supermarket for the night.

programme.title: The Rabbids are making a mess!
programme.desc: After discovering the joys of tennis, the Rabbids move the game onto an airport runway.

programme.title: The Rabbids are escaping!
programme.desc: John the scientist is trapped inside a rabbid's body, and gets thrown into the junkyard.

programme.title: The Rabbids are morons.
programme.desc: In order to get a little, Hibernation Rabbid divides the Junkyard into two separate zones with a border fence.

programme.title: Dr Mad Rabbid is out of control!
programme.desc: Mad Rabbid has found a great way to become invisible, now he just needs a guinea pig to test it.

programme.title: The Rabbids lead the investigation.
programme.desc: When a thief robs a piece from Hibernation Rabbid's Teleporta-TV, Investigator Rabbid leads the investigation

programme.title: The Rabbids make their cinema.
programme.desc: A cowboy rabbid has come back to town looking for the outlaw rabbid who destroyed his rocking horse.

programme.title: Revenge of the Rabbids.
programme.desc: Blasted into the Polar Regions when his secret HQ explodes, Evil Rabbid raises a penguin army!

programme.title: The Rabbids are in love.
programme.desc: A rabbid falls in love with the Teleporta-TV, enticed by the machine's incredible capacities.

programme.title: The Rabbids are having fun!
programme.desc: The Rabbids find a cellphone on the sidewalk. They're fascinated by the ring tone.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Dulcy exhibits strange behavior, Sally discovers she's going through a "rites of passage" stage of her adolescence. In Dragon tradition, she is drawn to Dragon Lair, a migratory nesting ground, through trance-like visits from her mother.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Antoine decides to study martial arts but after he wrecks most of Knothole Sonic sends him off to practice in the woods. //Tails begins his training to become a real Freedom Fighter by learning tracking skills while on a camping trip.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik launches a spy-orb that will uncover the Freedom Fighter's Knothole location, Sonic and Robot launch themselves up to the orbiting spy-sphere aboard a home-made rocket powered by Robotnik's discarded booster engine.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters run into a Swashbuckler, named Ari, battling Swat-Bots. Sonic diverts them, allowing Ari to escape. After hearing that Robotnik is holding his band of Freedom Fighters hostage, Ari decides to help Sonic free them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation, his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.sub-title: A Hedgehog's Home Is Her Castle
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs find out that Sonia has inherited a castle. She basks in the idea of having a castle for headquarters.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs steal historical artifacts of Mobuis from Robotnik before he can pawn them off at an auction.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic becomes aggravated that maybe their efforts of fighting for freedom seem pointless. Sonia suggests that they go to the Oracle for advice.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik has his eyes set upon Queen Aleena's crown jewel, but Sonic, Manic and Sonia plan to retrieve the gem before Robotnik.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Booty and the Beast
programme.desc: Kaptain Skurvy and his crew invade Kongo Bongo Island and keep Donkey Kong and Diddy in their ship and tries to steal the Crystal Coconut.

programme.title: SONIC X Beating Eggman Part 1
programme.desc: Tails and Chris discover the third Chaos Emerald in a field and fly for it in the X-Tornado, but Eggman and E-51 catch up and trap them! Meanwhile, Rouge and Topaz launch an attack on Eggman's base.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Barrel, Barrel... Who's Got the Barrel
programme.desc: Bluster tries to impress Candy by getting a ridiculous toupee, but when that doesn't work, he tries to steal the Crystal Coconut. Meanwhile, King K. Rool tries to build a spy satellite.

programme.title: SONIC X The Last Resort
programme.desc: After Chris, Amy, Cream and Cheese arrive at a resort, Eggman appears and tries to take over with his E-39 but Sonic arrives and tries to stop him. However Sonic is unable to swim, and the robot tries to drag him into the ocean!

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Bad Hair Day
programme.desc: King K. Rool finds out that someone can get weak by having its hair cut and creates the Candy Clone robot in order to cut Donkey Kong's hair and remove his strength.

programme.title: SONIC X Unfair Ball
programme.desc: It's Team Sonic vs Team Eggman in a game of baseball for a Chaos Emerald! Team Sonic falls behind at first but then wins with a Sonic super-play, only to have Eggman to cheat and try to steal the Emerald regardless!

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
