programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Ape Foo Young
programme.desc: Cranky creates a youth potion, so he can take care of the Crystal Coconut himself. Donkey Kong accidentally drinks it, making him become a baby ape.

programme.title: SONIC X Fly Spy
programme.desc: The President plants a fake emerald to try and attract Sonic but Rouge takes the bait instead. She winds up being hired by the Government to search inside Eggman's base with another agent, Topaz. Their search was going well, until they encountered the E-70!

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Booty and the Beast
programme.desc: Kaptain Skurvy and his crew invade Kongo Bongo Island and keep Donkey Kong and Diddy in their ship and tries to steal the Crystal Coconut.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: Seeking a way to save their doomed world, a crew of tiny, human-looking aliens arrives on Earth in the perfect disguise--a spaceship shaped like an ordinary man.

programme.title: Dan In Real Life
programme.desc: In this down-to-earth dramedy, a widowed advice columnist and single father (Steve Carell) falls in love with a woman (Juliette Binoche) only to discover she is dating his brother.

programme.title: The Hustle
programme.desc: Josephine Chesterfield (Anne Hathaway) is a glamorous, seductive Brit with a penchant for defrauding gullible wealthy men. Into her well-ordered world bursts Penny Rust (Rebel Wilson), an Aussie who is as free-form and fun-loving as Josephine is calculated and cunning.

programme.title: The Spy Next Door
programme.desc: Former CIA spy takes on his toughest assignment to date: looking after his girlfriend's three kids.

programme.title: A Miracle on Christmas Lake
programme.desc: After a teenage boy loses his best friend and his Dad both around Christmas he quits his favorite sport of hockey and turns from is friends. When an ice rink magically appears on the frozen lake near his home, he reminisces the good times.

programme.title: Lost at Christmas
programme.desc: In this feel-good festive comedy, two strangers come together as they try to get home for Christmas.

programme.title: A Different Kind Of Christmas
programme.desc: What is like to grow up with a dad who truly believes he's Santa Claus? For Elizabeth Gates (Shelley Long) every kid's dream was her worst nightmare…and it's not over when Dad returns just in time to complicate her run for mayor. Based on a true story.

programme.title: A Christmas in Royal Fashion
programme.desc: Kristin Cooper, the pretty and talented assistant at a global PR firm, is put in charge of the annual Christmas Fashion Show and Auction for clothing entrepreneur, Mr. Carson.

programme.title: Mommy's Cheating Scandal
programme.desc: (2021) Thriller based on real-life events, with Karis Cameron. A student gets caught in an admission scandal in a bid to get into a good college. A manhunt for the ring leader has deadly consequences.

programme.title: Burning Lies
programme.desc: (2021) Tense psychological thriller with Annika Foster. A woman falls for a handsome firefighter who saves her life, but soon discovers that his overprotective nature can get obsessive - and deadly.

programme.title: Secrets of a Gold Digger Killer
programme.desc: (2021) Gripping thriller based on true events, starring Julie Benz. A femme fatale with a taste for riches pulls the strings on a deadly plot to have her multi-millionaire husband murdered.

programme.title: Snatched from Mommy
programme.desc: (2021) Heart-wrenching psychological thriller starring Chelsea Hobbs. When blogger Elizabeth's baby is kidnapped, she uncovers a betrayal that hits much closer to home than she realised.

programme.title: Diana
programme.desc: Celebrated and adored by millions, she was the Queen of people's hearts, yet the bittersweet story of the last man to truly capture hers has never before. In a story that until now has remained untold, Diana introduces a time in the Princess's life that was important in shaping her final years...

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: It's a race for survival in the criminal underworld of New York in the action-packed thriller TRACERS.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: Director Simon West and Nicolas Cage team-up for the first time since the 1997 blockbuster CON AIR for STOLEN, a unique fast paced action thriller that takes place during 10 frantic hours on Mardi Gras day in New Orleans.

programme.title: Waiting for Anya
programme.desc: From the mind of world-renowned author Michael Morpurgo comes the cinematic adaptation of Waiting for Anya - a powerful and authentic true story of a young shepherd that had a key part to play in one of the world's most shocking moments in history.

programme.title: Northpole
programme.desc: When a loss of togetherness spreads across the globe and threatens the existence of Santa's Northpole, a little boy named Kevin is called upon to save the day.

programme.title: Angel and the Badman
programme.desc: Quirt Evans, an all round bad guy, is nursed back to health and sought after by Penelope Worth, a Quaker girl. He eventually finds himself having to choose between his world and the world Penelope lives in.

programme.title: Karen Kingsbury's The Bridge
programme.desc: Two new students at nearby Belmont University, Ryan and Molly, meet the first day of classes and become study partners. The Bridge, a local bookstore, becomes a close part of their lives as their relationship grows.

programme.title: Dirty Heroes
programme.desc: Holland, Spring 1945. As World War II draws to a close, two armies stand against each other for the final showdown. On one side, you have the strong Allied forces, while on the other is what's left of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Evening
programme.desc: As Ann Lord reflects on one beautiful and life-changing weekend with the one true love of her life, her daughters come to their own understanding about the power of the past and the unbreakable bonds between mothers and daughters.

programme.title: King Of California
programme.desc: Commercial airline pilot Whip Whitaker (Denzel Washington) has a problem with drugs and alcohol, though so far he's managed to complete his flights safely.

programme.title: Big Mommas House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the devil who slyly promises to do just that — for a price.

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: After his family is kidnapped, a young Wall Street trader is confronted by the people responsible.

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: A pill that enables a user to access 100% of his brain transforms a struggling writer into a financial wizard.

programme.title: Patriots Day
programme.desc: Chronicles the courage and power of the people of Boston during the manhunt for the Boston Marathon bombers.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg leads an all-star cast in the thrilling story of real-life heroes on a burning oil rig.

programme.title: A Miracle on Christmas Lake
programme.desc: After the loss of his best friend on Christmas Eve, Bobby goes out onto the lake and makes a shocking discovery. When the land is bought, Bobby must rally the town to save it.

programme.title: 12 Dogs of Christmas
programme.desc: A girl who uses dogs to teach people about the true meaning of Christmas during the Depression.

programme.title: 12 Dogs of Christmas 2: Great Puppy Rescue
programme.desc: In this heartwarming sequel to the holiday classic, Emma (Danielle Chuchran) rallies her friends new and old to save a beloved puppy orphanage by putting on a musical holiday extravaganza.

programme.title: Feather Christmas
programme.desc: For single dad, and veterinarian, Martin, Christmas is all about upholding regular family traditions to keep the memory of his late wife alive. But when an ailing pet chicken arrives at his home-run animal sanctuary, the family's festive plans, and entire world, are turned upside down, as new love blossoms and spreads its wings!

programme.title: You Can't Fight Christmas
programme.desc: Interior decorator and Christmas fanatic, Leslie Major, has the yearly task of decorating the lobby of the famed Chesterton Hotel. But one fateful day whilst working on a ladder to reach the top of the tree, she falls into the arms of Edmund James, the grandson of the hotel's owner. However, Edmund is all business and plans to put an end to the annual tradition. Can Leslie work her magic and teach him to love Christmas?

programme.title: Bad Parents
programme.desc: Let the battle commence in Bad Parents, a hilarious, comedic look into the manic world of football and overzealous parents! Suburban mother Kathy (Janeane Garofalo: Ratatouille) is thrust into the hyper-competitive world of football when she signs up her 7-year-old daughter for a team with a mass of crazy parents involved. The game is on in this hysterical comedy. An absolute must watch!

programme.title: Iron Mask
programme.desc: The Iron Mask' follows English traveller Jonathan Green as he journeys from Russia to China encountering dragons, black magic wizardry and a dragon king during an incredible but deadly adventure.

programme.title: The Resistance
programme.desc: Compassionate, harrowing and full of unexpected humour, this is the incredible telling of a largely unknown chapter of the Jewish resistance. While the Nazi regime celebrate the capital of the Reich free of Jews, they are unaware of a group who have escaped. Hidden in their various guises we follow the journey of four Jews as they survive, while hiding in plain sight of the enemy.

programme.title: The Adventures of Maid Marian
programme.desc: Everyone knows the stories of Robin Hood and Maid Marian robbing from the rich to give to the poor, daring escapes from the evil Sheriff, sword fights and adventures. They eventually culminate in the arrival of King Richard the Lionheart who grants the outlaw a royal pardon. Most of the stories end here. This is the story of what happens next. A legend returns to save her people again...

programme.title: Harvest Moon
programme.desc: Jen is from a privileged background. But when her circumstances change and she is forced to live on the family's pumpkin farm, she finds herself clashing with handsome farm manager, Brett. (2015)

programme.title: Sweet Autumn
programme.desc: Maggie's late aunt leaves her half of a candy store and the other half to handsome stranger Dex. Maggie uncovers the reason for her aunt's decision using the letters she left behind. (2020)

programme.title: Pumpkin Pie Wars
programme.desc: Casey and Sam are from rival families. But will competing against each other in the annual Pumpkin Pie Contest bring the pair closer together or drive them even further apart? (2016)

programme.title: Autumn in The City
programme.desc: After moving to New York, a woman and a jaded writer experience autumn in the city and try to figure out who they're truly meant to be. Starring Aimee Teegarden (2022)

programme.title: Home For Harvest
programme.desc: (2019) Charming romance with Brigitte Kingsley. A writer is assigned to cover a story in the town she left, heartbroken, years ago - only to find herself torn between her ex and a new man in town...

programme.title: The Beauty Of Love
programme.desc: Emma has a lifestyle website that she puts her heart and soul into called “Classically Emma”. But when her numbers start trending down, she thinks she might've found her fix in a partnership with an ambitious millennial named Jill who has her own dreams.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Workaholic Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies.

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley's brilliant at organizing other people's engagements, but unlucky in finding romance herself. When designing her most important proposal yet, the man who could jeopardize it all may be the one who helps find her own love story.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: Passionate fashion stylist Rose is living her best life in NYC when she suddenly inherits her grandmother's vintage dress shop and must return to her small hometown. There, she runs into her charming high school crush Cole Murphey, who helps her renovate the store.

programme.title: Rekindling Christmas
programme.desc: Drafted by the NFL Jesse left his college sweetheart behind. Now, years later, he's back with only one goal, to win Annika back.

programme.title: A Candlelit Christmas
programme.desc: Ellie, a perfume maker, travels back home for Christmas and help her dad with the business. Little does she know, that Logan is staying with him. As Ellie's attempts to learn about her family, Logan helps her realize that fairy tales do indeed exist!

programme.title: Finding Mrs. Claus
programme.desc: When Mrs. Claus (Mira Sorvino) feels neglected by her less than attentive husband (Will Sasso), she goes to Las Vegas to help a little girl with her Christmas wish.

programme.title: Fixing Up Christmas
programme.desc: Known as a “fixer” for difficult clients, a talented party planner must help a young CEO plan the Christmas party of the year to dazzle the mayor and save his company. Wil the "fixer" fix something more than just the company?

programme.title: Sound Of Christmas
programme.desc: Whilst trying to reignite his daughter's passion for Christmas, Brad, falls in love with piano teacher, Lizzie. However, their romance is threatened by Brad's business interests.

programme.title: Love Finds You in Sugarcreek
programme.desc: A father and son fleeing a shocking and brutal tragedy settle in the predominantly Amish town of Sugarcreek, Ohio. They are taken in by three sisters who offer the father work as a handyman, but a local policewoman begins to become suspicious of his past.

programme.title: A Christmas Wish
programme.desc: Abandoned by her husband a few days before Christmas, Martha Evans travels cross-country with the kids in search of work.

programme.title: Off The Menu
programme.desc: An unlikely heir to a Mexican fast-food franchise goes ‘cuisine' hunting for the next culinary big thing he can ‘borrow,' and finds himself in a small, dusty New Mexican town where people come from all over to salivate over the culinary treats of a local female chef.

programme.title: Love, Alaska
programme.desc: When two childhood friends are reunited through a generous inheritance that bestows far more on their broken hearts than they bargained for - a second chance at love.

programme.title: Holiday in Your Heart
programme.desc: 14-year-old LeAnn Rimes sings at Nashville concert, faces tough family decision.

programme.title: My Christmas Grandpa
programme.desc: Girl requests cashier as grandpa for Christmas Vivica A. Fox, Bill Cobbs star.

programme.title: Reindeer Games Homecoming
programme.desc: MacKenzie competes in "The Reindeer Games" keep her father's tradition alive.

programme.title: Last Chance for Christmas
programme.desc: Santa's handsome but beleaguered stable master John must rush off to Alaska.

programme.title: My Dog's Christmas Miracle
programme.desc: Cinnamon, Madeline's pet, grapples with her new love Kevin and son Jordan.

programme.title: Falling in Love at Christmas
programme.desc: Business rivals who playfully despise each other work together on a holiday gift-giving app and feelings grow.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Henry's old flame, Christina, is back and in need of his help. Vicki wonders if she has ulterior motives.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Paintings made on canvasses possessed by a dead painter serve as a portal for him to enter and commit murders.

programme.title: Mommy Would Never Hurt You
programme.desc: Riley wants to rebuild her bond with her mom and sick sister, but uncovers a secret that changes everything.

programme.title: A Lethal Lesson
programme.desc: High school teacher Lauren is accused of an affair by a student, putting her job and life in jeopardy.

programme.title: As Good As It Gets
programme.desc: The Academy Award-winning (best actor Jack Nicholson, best actress Helen Hunt) offbeat comedy celebrates the unique bond between three very different characters. Also stars Greg Kinnear.

programme.title: I Spy
programme.desc: A professional boxer (Eddie Murphy) has to help a U.S. government agent recover a missing jet.

programme.title: Think Like A Man
programme.desc: Four friends conspire to turn the tables on their women when they discover the ladies have been using Steve Harvey's relationship advice against them.

programme.title: The Son of Zorro
programme.desc: In imperial Mexico, nobleman Don Ricardo secretly fights as the Son of Zorro against corrupt Governor Leblanche. When rebels ambush a weapons transport, killing Don Herrera, Ricardo rescues his daughter Conchita and hides her, fueling a revolution for justice and freedom.

programme.title: Ultimate Gunfighter
programme.desc: Two family clans have always been enemies they spend their time hating and killing each other. The daughter of the Campos family and the son of the Mounter family fall in love, thus causing further hatred and deaths.

programme.title: The Shooting
programme.desc: A mysterious woman persuades two cowboys to help her in a revenge scheme.

programme.title: Seven Guns for the MacGregors
programme.desc: Ranch owner MacGregor has seven sons and oldest Gregor leads his brothers to Las Mesas, a small town where they want to sell horses. They get into trouble with local people who are related with evil Santillana. After getting imprisoned and losing their horses they decide to go after Santillana's gang.

programme.title: Guns Of The Revolution
programme.desc: In Mexico, a mad general is leading his own war against the Church.

programme.title: Anna Karenina.
programme.desc: Tolstoy's tale of the ardent but doomed love between Anna, the wife of a cold and upright civil servant and Vronsky, the more dashing character with whom she falls in love when first she sees him

programme.title: CRACKERJACK
programme.desc: A modern-day Robin Hood is thrilling England by stealing from the rich and giving to the poor. When he unintentionally witnesses a robbery, he becomes aware that a gang of crooks are framing him as the culprit. Will he be able to outwit them?

programme.title: Went the Day Well?
programme.desc: Bramley End, snug and safe, seemed far away from the events of World War II. Little did the villagers suspect the grim events which were impending.

programme.title: A Hill in Korea.
programme.desc: A small fighting patrol is detailed to search a village in Korea. Chinese armies cut off their retreat to their own lines and the patrol is left with only one possible stronghold, a deserted temple on the summit of the nearby mountain.

programme.title: Flying Scot
programme.desc: British crime caper directed by Compton Bennett, as a team of thieves combine forces for a sensational train robbery.

programme.title: Just for you
programme.desc: A road movie about young people who heal their wounds from love through busking in the streets of Vietnam.

programme.title: Last Film
programme.desc: Sang-min accumulated a significant amount of debt while making movies, eventually coming under threat from loan sharks. Afterward, "Sang-min" embarks on a journey with "Man-bok," experiencing events that blur the lines between dream and reality. The ultimate film they always wanted to create becomes their last reel. In the midst of this crisis, loan shark Man-bok approaches Sang-min and proposes a deal: if Sang-min makes a film about Man-bok's life, Man-bok will help him pay off his debt. Sang-min accepts the offer, and as they work At a provincial university's film and theater department, Park Sang-min, who teaches film, is also a film director.

programme.title: Little Brother
programme.desc: A warming and touching drama about a 9-year-old troublemaker who suddenly starts behaving himself believing that being good can save his ill brother.

programme.title: B grade Twenties
programme.desc: "Kyeo-re," a 4th-year student majoring in film directing at an art school, pours her heart and soul into her graduation film screenplay one morning, only to have it stolen by her former boyfriend and senior in the same major, "Hyun-soo." Shocked and devastated, Kyeore quickly begins preparing a new screenplay. Imperfect as it may be, it brings together a group of graduation film team members, capturing their growth and love story.

programme.title: Iris: New Generation
programme.desc: During peace talks a North Korean diplomat is killed sparking a hunt as NSS faces moles and terrorism.

programme.title: Nailed
programme.desc: Jae-gu and Sun-yeong a couple that runs an auto-shop off set off an chain of events headed for catastrophe.

programme.title: Hide-And-Never Seek
programme.desc: VJ Glow is the MC of the horror-based online channel. One day he stumbles upon a frightening video of mystery.

programme.title: Circle Of Atonement
programme.desc: A grieving teacher meets a detective's daughter unveiling a long-hidden secret through their connection.

programme.title: Robot Overlords
programme.desc: The adults lost the war and now the kids must save the world! Robots rule the streets and the people are locked in their homes. Stepping outside risks being vaporised by a hulking Sentry or picked off by a lethal Sniper.

programme.title: Edge of War
programme.desc: A series of incidents around the world lead to greater conflict, placing the superpowers at one another's throats. Armies march, bombs rain down, soldiers storm the beaches. One family is caught up in the conflict, can they survive as total war is declared and nuclear weapons are unleashed?

programme.title: Rise of the Jurassic
programme.desc: A young scientist and her team arrive at a mysterious island, looking for answers as to what happened to her father who disappeared there years ago. What they find is beyond what any of them expected.

programme.title: Max Winslow and the House of Secrets
programme.desc: Five teens are invited to the home of an eccentric billionaire to compete in a game to win his mansion. The night takes a dark turn when they become trapped in the house and are forced to face off against each other and an evil AI entity who controls everything in the house including their fate.

programme.title: Fixing Up Christmas
programme.desc: (2021) Deck the halls with Natalie Dreyfuss. When a workaholic executive hires a festive fixer for his family's company Christmas party, sparks fly, ornaments drop and love comes down the chimney.

programme.title: A Christmas Reunion
programme.desc: (2015) Romance starring Denise Richards and Patrick Muldoon. A high-flying executive inherits half of her aunt's bakery, but when she meets the co-owner, will it be a recipe for disaster or romance?

programme.title: Christmas Connection
programme.desc: A flight attendant's Christmas plans unravel when she is asked to look after an unaccompanied minor. Will she accept an invitation to spend Christmas with the young girl and her father? (2018)

programme.title: Family For Christmas
programme.desc: A conversation at a Christmas Party sees Hannah question her life choices when she is granted a wish to experience what life would have been like had she stayed with her college sweetheart. (2015)

programme.title: A Christmas Coincidence
programme.desc: Paula decides to stay with her aunt for Christmas after accepting her boyfriend's wedding proposal. Will her doubts about the engagement deepen when she meets a charming inn owner? (2018)

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol agent (Owen) attempts to expose a high-profile financial institution's role in an international arms dealing ring.

programme.title: Anacondas: The Hunt For The Blood Orchid
programme.desc: When a corporate pharmaceutical sponsor is about to pull the plug on research, part-time adventurer Dr. Jack Byron re-awakens their interest with tales of the Borneo black orchid, said to produce a chemical that can keep a cell reproducing indefinitely. When the trip becomes increasingly dangerous, due to floods, capsized boats and gigantic, ill-tempered anacondas, Byron refuses to allow his crew to end the expedition, and resorts to foul play in order to keep them on the trail.

programme.title: Proud Mary
programme.desc: A hit woman's life is turned completely around when she meets a young boy who awakens in her a maternal instinct she never knew she had.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol agent (Owen) attempts to expose a high-profile financial institution's role in an international arms dealing ring.

programme.title: Fame
programme.desc: In this soaring and inspiring reinvention of the Oscar®-Winning hit film Fame (1980), a group of highly gifted dancers,singers, musicians and actors at the New York City High School of Performing Arts strive to live out their dreams and shine!

programme.title: The War Below
programme.desc: During World War I, a group of British miners are recruited to tunnel underneath no man's land and set bombs from below the German front in hopes of breaking the deadly stalemate of the Battle of Messines.

programme.title: Walt Before Mickey
programme.desc: The legendary Walt Disney had a tumultuous childhood, yet he was determined to overcome obstacles in his path, before the creation of his first iconic character: Mickey Mouse.

programme.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
programme.desc: This biographical drama chronicles the life of one of the world's greatest footballers.

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: They chose the worst man for the job. They expected him to fail, but he wasn't about to let a witness be murdered on his watch. Personal demons put Jack a New York City cop at rock bottom.

programme.title: The Missing Sister
programme.desc: When Sharon finally tracks down her missing sister Raven, she's elated to be back together – until she begins to suspect that Raven isn't her sister at all, but rather an opportunistic imposter.

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: In the fast-paced action thriller SNITCH, Dwayne Johnson stars as a father whose teenage son is wrongly accused of a drug distribution crime and is looking at a mandatory minimum prison sentence of 10 years.

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: An innocent discovery of a well-preserved mummified Emperor from 200 B.C. China unearths a two thousand-year-old nightmare, a secret that should have remained buried.
